subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet We have addressed unto that night wherein the heavens and the earth were illumined by a Light that cast its radiance over the entire creation
subcodes.first_line_orig: لوح من لدنا الی لیله فیها لاحت السموات و الارض من نیر به انار من فی العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @transcendence; unknowability of God
